articles.summary: The next time you apply for a job, AI may screen your résumé before any human sees it. But there’s good reason to question whether AI will judge you fairly. Researchers already know that LLMs pick up human biases from their training data. As AI companies race to build agentic models that remember the tiniest details about users, they may be handing them ammunition…
